patch.value: Sentry PM-CLI-2B: external extension subprocess cannot resolve pm executable

Investigate and correctly attribute the single handled spawnSync pm ENOENT event emitted by an external readPmItems extension command. Determine the owning package and replace PATH-dependent recursive CLI invocation with the public pm SDK or an explicit executable contract; prevent downstream extension failures from being attributed as high pm-cli core errors without hiding actionable failures.

Identify the emitting extension/package and release; remove or harden the PATH-dependent spawnSync pm call in the owning repository; use the public SDK where appropriate; PM-CLI-2B no longer blocks the pm-cli Sentry gate; document fresh event and telemetry evidence.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-07-14: all-status searches for PM-CLI-2B, spawnSync pm ENOENT, and readPmItems plus direct tracker scans found no canonical item. Live Sentry issue https://unbrained.sentry.io/issues/134232002/ is one handled high event from pm-cli@2026.7.11 at 2026-07-14T11:55:59Z on external host e2b.local; repository source and installed project extensions contain no readPmItems implementation, so ownership discovery remains required.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Live Sentry evidence 2026-07-14: PM-CLI-2B remains unresolved high, one handled event on pm-cli@2026.7.11, first/last seen 2026-07-14T11:55:59Z. Stack identifies an external extension readPmItems spawnSync('pm') ENOENT path; no recurrence was present. pnpm sentry:telemetry:gate classifies this as one of two actionable highs. This bundle does not claim or implement pm-d4ns.

value.author: unknown
value.text: Live verification 2026-07-15: release readiness again reports PM-CLI-2B as unresolved high with exactly one handled event, first/last seen 2026-07-14T11:55:59Z on pm-cli@2026.7.11. The stack still enters through an external extension readPmItems implementation that recursively spawnSyncs the pm executable; no recurrence or pm-cli-core implementation ownership is visible. This SDK/config/author bundle does not claim pm-d4ns.
